' R d ^ r 3 n f e H T ^ T * f d ^ MWcil'^T'fafa?*W f fef^T 3TlfW7: ^TT ^T ff=mf ^ 3T*lfa ^ ¬•Tfaf*T 3?ftf^Kt STCT faPw-i fen ^TTQTTT 1 w ^ l * ^ i , ‚Äî ^ f w f f ^ y4)^iH "^ %=q; M * H ^ ^f¬£[TeH ^ ifcFfa =>4tff "^t ^T^HT 3Tft 'MRUIIHT ^ t WTO ["<R =R 9/7/2007-3=^^ Tft] Pd"4U| : ^ "PWT *m?T =¬£ <NM^ 3rcn¬´m7n\ *TFT II, ^ 3, 3^-^f^ (i) H HI.^T.fT. 534(3=1) TTRtel 5 1 w ^ , 2006 =q ychl^llcf feT TTTT ^ | MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, ihe 23rd July, 2008 G.S.R. 553(E).‚ÄîIn exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (2) of Section 29A rend with clause (a) of sub-section (2) of Section 9 of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949), Lhc Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Chartered Accountants (Election to the Council) Rules. 2006, namely:- ‚Äî I. (1) These rules may be called the Chartered Accountants (Election to the Council) Amendment Rules, 2008. (2) These shall come into force with effect from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Chartered Accountants (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006. for rule 39, the following shall be substituted, namely‚Äî " 3 9 . R e t u r n i n g Officer to decide on certain matters.‚ÄîIf any question pertaining to or incidental to the procedure for conduct of elections including matters not specifically covered by these rules, arises, it shall be decided by the Returning Officer or the officer authorised by him under these rules. Explanation.‚ÄîFor the purpose of this rule, the conduct of election shall also include the process of counting of voles and declaration of results.*' [F,"No.9/7/2007-lGC] JITESII KHOSLA. Jt. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Pail II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vKfeNo. G.S.R. 534(E) dated the 5th September, 2006. 2799 GI/2008 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of tndia Press and Published by the Controller Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-] 10064 of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
